description: Custom fixed and random reminder scheduler Create and manage reminders with customized notification. Features • Schedule weekly fixed and random notifications for specific time range • Triggered on specific days of the week • Specify both the title and long-form multiline message • Group same reminder notifications together to avoid clutting • Specify the alarm type: sound, vibration, both or muted • Use exact alarm for non muted notifications • Use battery preserving scheduling on muted notifications • Localizations available for french, italian, spanish and german
